description_long: This is a tall, vintage-style floor lamp with a round, weighted base and a slender, straight pole leading up to a decorative central node. The lamp features a distressed, pleated fabric lampshade that appears worn and tattered, with visible tears and fraying along the upper edge. The shade is conical and sits atop a metallic support structure, which is subtly ornamented. The base and pole are made of dark, aged metal, giving the lamp an industrial yet antique appearance. The overall design suggests it is intended for ambient lighting in urban or rustic settings, such as old city apartments, parks, or retro-themed public spaces. The lamp's weathered look and unique shade make it a striking decorative piece as well as a functional amenity.
description: A tall, vintage floor lamp with a distressed, pleated fabric shade and an aged metal base and pole. The shade is tattered, giving the lamp an antique, urban character.
description_view_0: The lamp is seen from a slight angle, highlighting the torn upper edge of the pleated fabric shade and the round, sturdy base.
description_view_1: This view shows the lamp's shade from another side, revealing more fraying and the decorative central node on the pole.
description_view_2: The lamp is viewed straight on, emphasizing the symmetry of the pole and the even pleating of the shade.
description_view_3: A direct frontal view, showing the full shape of the shade and the clean lines of the pole and base.
